'''tashana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ixolite|ixolite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-sh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ixolite|ixolite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tashana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæshænæth|tæshænæth]] || [[word:tæshænæj|tæshænæj]] || [[word:tæshænæsh|tæshænæsh]] || [[word:tæshænæ|tæshænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tashashanath|tashashanath]] || [[word:tashashanaj|tashashanaj]] || [[word:tashashanash|tashashanash]] || [[word:tashashana|tashashana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tashanath|tashanath]] || [[word:tashanaj|tashanaj]] || [[word:tashanash|tashanash]] || [[word:tashana|tashana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tashafnath|tashafnath]] || [[word:tashafnaj|tashafnaj]] || [[word:tashafnash|tashafnash]] || [[word:tashafnaf|tashafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tashanatha|tashanatha]] || [[word:tashanaja|tashanaja]] || [[word:tashanasha|tashanasha]] || [[word:tashanaka|tashanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tashanath|tashanath]] || [[word:tashanaj|tashanaj]] || [[word:tashanash|tashanash]] || [[word:tashana|tashana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tashanathal|tashanathal]] || [[word:tashanajal|tashanajal]] || [[word:tashanashal|tashanashal]] || [[word:tashanakal|tashanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tashanathatha|tashanathatha]] || [[word:tashanajaja|tashanajaja]] || [[word:tashanashasha|tashanashasha]] || [[word:tashanaka|tashanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tashanathan|tashanathan]] || [[word:tashanajan|tashanajan]] || [[word:tashanashan|tashanashan]] || [[word:tashanakan|tashanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tashanathaoro|tashanathaoro]] || [[word:tashanajaoro|tashanajaoro]] || [[word:tashanashaoro|tashanashaoro]] || [[word:tashanakaoro|tashanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
